base.notes: Data and derivatives mix offset cyclical cash equities; mid-cycle normalization

bull.notes: Sustained IPO pipeline and BCX carbon credits scale

distributions.fy2024_dps_note: Interim 14 sen + final 18 sen + special 8 sen per FY2024 condensed report
